items.title: Beyond Siri: Here are the practical AI features coming to your iPhone in iOS 27
items.content: Siri’s AI overhaul may have grabbed the headlines at WWDC, but some of Apple’s most useful AI features are arriving elsewhere in iOS 27.

items.title: Every new iOS 27 feature that’s worth knowing about
items.content: While it's not flashy like Apple’s new Siri AI and Apple Intelligence upgrades, there are still a number of additions to iOS 27 worth looking at.

items.title: Apple opens up App Store to new competition in Brazil
items.content: Apple’s grip on iPhone app distribution is loosening in another major market: Brazil.

items.title: AI is hurting Apple in more ways than one: it may force iPhone price increases
items.content: CEO Tim Cook said in a recent interview that the situation is "unsustainable."

items.title: Microsoft taps Alt Carbon in sign of India’s growing role in carbon removal
items.content: Alt Carbon said the agreement followed more than a year of scientific review and due diligence, with Microsoft requiring additional verification and data-sharing measures.

items.title: Microsoft’s open source tools were hacked to steal passwords of AI developers
items.content: Microsoft shut down dozens of GitHub code repositories for Azure and AI coding tools after a reported hack.

items.title: Is this the dawn of the Tokenpocalypse?
items.content: We're likely to see more price increases as the big AI companies plan to go public.

items.title: Reid Hoffman is leaving Microsoft’s board to go ‘founder mode’ with  startup Manas
items.content: After a very profitable decade on Microsoft's board, Reid Hoffman is stepping down to focus on his AI drug discovery startup Manus.

items.title: YouTube Stars Take Center Stage at Creative Artists Agency
items.content: For years, creators were on the fringes at Creative Artists Agency, a Hollywood talent behemoth. Now the agency is putting them center stage.

items.title: Clive Davis, Music Industry Titan Who Signed Whitney Houston, Dies at 94
items.content: He rose from a midlevel position at Columbia Records to become one of music’s most powerful executives, shepherding stars like Barry Manilow and Whitney Houston.

items.title: ‘The View’ Asks Its Audience for Help in Battle With F.C.C.
items.content: The daytime TV talk show is at the center of a dispute with the Federal Communications Commission over political speech.

items.title: U.K. Markets React Calmly to Starmer Resignation, but Economic Uncertainties Linger
items.content: Markets reacted calmly to the prime minister’s announcement, which laid out a timeline for succession. Still, there’s not much clarity about the next government.
